  * @param array $allowed_protocols Optional. Allowed protocol in links.
  * @return string Filtered content with only allowed HTML elements
  */
-function wp_kses( $string, $allowed_html, $allowed_protocols = array() ) {
+function wp_kses( $string, $allowed_html, $allowed_protocols = [] ) {
 	if ( empty( $allowed_protocols ) )
 		$allowed_protocols = wp_allowed_protocols();
 	$string = wp_kses_no_null($string);
@@ -532,7 +532,7 @@
 			break;
 		case 'strip':
 			/** This filter is documented in wp-includes/kses.php */
-			return apply_filters( 'wp_kses_allowed_html', array(), $context );
+			return apply_filters( 'wp_kses_allowed_html', [], $context );
 			break;
 		case 'entities':
 			/** This filter is documented in wp-includes/kses.php */
@@ -637,12 +637,12 @@
 function wp_kses_split2($string, $allowed_html, $allowed_protocols) {
 	$string = wp_kses_stripslashes($string);
 
-	if (substr($string, 0, 1) != '<')
+	if (!str_starts_with($string, '<'))
 		return '>';
 	# It matched a ">" character
 
-	if ( '<!--' == substr( $string, 0, 4 ) ) {
-		$string = str_replace( array('<!--', '-->'), '', $string );
+	if ( str_starts_with($string, '<!--') ) {
+		$string = str_replace( ['<!--', '-->'], '', $string );
 		while ( $string != ($newstring = wp_kses($string, $allowed_html, $allowed_protocols)) )
 			$string = $newstring;
 		if ( $string == '' )
@@ -650,7 +650,7 @@
 		// prevent multiple dashes in comments
 		$string = preg_replace('/--+/', '-', $string);
 		// prevent three dashes closing a comment
-		$string = preg_replace('/-$/', '', $string);
+		$string = preg_replace('/-$/', '', (string) $string);
 		return "<!--{$string}-->";
 	}
 	# Allow HTML comments
@@ -717,14 +717,14 @@
 
 	$allowed_attr = $allowed_html[strtolower($element)];
 	foreach ($attrarr as $arreach) {
-		if ( ! isset( $allowed_attr[strtolower($arreach['name'])] ) )
+		if ( ! isset( $allowed_attr[strtolower((string) $arreach['name'])] ) )
 			continue; # the attribute is not allowed
 
-		$current = $allowed_attr[strtolower($arreach['name'])];
+		$current = $allowed_attr[strtolower((string) $arreach['name'])];
 		if ( $current == '' )
 			continue; # the attribute is not allowed
 
-		if ( strtolower( $arreach['name'] ) == 'style' ) {
+		if ( strtolower( (string) $arreach['name'] ) == 'style' ) {
 			$orig_value = $arreach['value'];
 			$value = safecss_filter_attr( $orig_value );
 
@@ -778,23 +778,23 @@
  * @return array List of attributes after parsing
  */
 function wp_kses_hair($attr, $allowed_protocols) {
-	$attrarr = array();
+	$attrarr = [];
 	$mode = 0;
 	$attrname = '';
-	$uris = array('xmlns', 'profile', 'href', 'src', 'cite', 'classid', 'codebase', 'data', 'usemap', 'longdesc', 'action');
+	$uris = ['xmlns', 'profile', 'href', 'src', 'cite', 'classid', 'codebase', 'data', 'usemap', 'longdesc', 'action'];
 
 	# Loop through the whole attribute list
 
-	while (strlen($attr) != 0) {
+	while (strlen((string) $attr) != 0) {
 		$working = 0; # Was the last operation successful?
 
 		switch ($mode) {
 			case 0 : # attribute name, href for instance
 
-				if ( preg_match('/^([-a-zA-Z:]+)/', $attr, $match ) ) {
+				if ( preg_match('/^([-a-zA-Z:]+)/', (string) $attr, $match ) ) {
 					$attrname = $match[1];
 					$working = $mode = 1;
-					$attr = preg_replace( '/^[-a-zA-Z:]+/', '', $attr );
+					$attr = preg_replace( '/^[-a-zA-Z:]+/', '', (string) $attr );
 				}
 
 				break;
@@ -801,22 +801,22 @@
 
 			case 1 : # equals sign or valueless ("selected")
 
-				if (preg_match('/^\s*=\s*/', $attr)) # equals sign
+				if (preg_match('/^\s*=\s*/', (string) $attr)) # equals sign
 					{
 					$working = 1;
 					$mode = 2;
-					$attr = preg_replace('/^\s*=\s*/', '', $attr);
+					$attr = preg_replace('/^\s*=\s*/', '', (string) $attr);
 					break;
 				}
 
-				if (preg_match('/^\s+/', $attr)) # valueless
+				if (preg_match('/^\s+/', (string) $attr)) # valueless
 					{
 					$working = 1;
 					$mode = 0;
 					if(false === array_key_exists($attrname, $attrarr)) {
-						$attrarr[$attrname] = array ('name' => $attrname, 'value' => '', 'whole' => $attrname, 'vless' => 'y');
+						$attrarr[$attrname] =  ['name' => $attrname, 'value' => '', 'whole' => $attrname, 'vless' => 'y'];
 					}
-					$attr = preg_replace('/^\s+/', '', $attr);
+					$attr = preg_replace('/^\s+/', '', (string) $attr);
 				}
 
 				break;
@@ -823,7 +823,7 @@
 
 			case 2 : # attribute value, a URL after href= for instance
 
-				if (preg_match('%^"([^"]*)"(\s+|/?$)%', $attr, $match))
+				if (preg_match('%^"([^"]*)"(\s+|/?$)%', (string) $attr, $match))
 					# "value"
 					{
 					$thisval = $match[1];
@@ -831,15 +831,15 @@
 						$thisval = wp_kses_bad_protocol($thisval, $allowed_protocols);
 
 					if(false === array_key_exists($attrname, $attrarr)) {
-						$attrarr[$attrname] = array ('name' => $attrname, 'value' => $thisval, 'whole' => "$attrname=\"$thisval\"", 'vless' => 'n');
+						$attrarr[$attrname] =  ['name' => $attrname, 'value' => $thisval, 'whole' => "$attrname=\"$thisval\"", 'vless' => 'n'];
 					}
 					$working = 1;
 					$mode = 0;
-					$attr = preg_replace('/^"[^"]*"(\s+|$)/', '', $attr);
+					$attr = preg_replace('/^"[^"]*"(\s+|$)/', '', (string) $attr);
 					break;
 				}
 
-				if (preg_match("%^'([^']*)'(\s+|/?$)%", $attr, $match))
+				if (preg_match("%^'([^']*)'(\s+|/?$)%", (string) $attr, $match))
 					# 'value'
 					{
 					$thisval = $match[1];
@@ -847,15 +847,15 @@
 						$thisval = wp_kses_bad_protocol($thisval, $allowed_protocols);
 
 					if(false === array_key_exists($attrname, $attrarr)) {
-						$attrarr[$attrname] = array ('name' => $attrname, 'value' => $thisval, 'whole' => "$attrname='$thisval'", 'vless' => 'n');
+						$attrarr[$attrname] =  ['name' => $attrname, 'value' => $thisval, 'whole' => "$attrname='$thisval'", 'vless' => 'n'];
 					}
 					$working = 1;
 					$mode = 0;
-					$attr = preg_replace("/^'[^']*'(\s+|$)/", '', $attr);
+					$attr = preg_replace("/^'[^']*'(\s+|$)/", '', (string) $attr);
 					break;
 				}
 
-				if (preg_match("%^([^\s\"']+)(\s+|/?$)%", $attr, $match))
+				if (preg_match("%^([^\s\"']+)(\s+|/?$)%", (string) $attr, $match))
 					# value
 					{
 					$thisval = $match[1];
@@ -863,12 +863,12 @@
 						$thisval = wp_kses_bad_protocol($thisval, $allowed_protocols);
 
 					if(false === array_key_exists($attrname, $attrarr)) {
-						$attrarr[$attrname] = array ('name' => $attrname, 'value' => $thisval, 'whole' => "$attrname=\"$thisval\"", 'vless' => 'n');
+						$attrarr[$attrname] =  ['name' => $attrname, 'value' => $thisval, 'whole' => "$attrname=\"$thisval\"", 'vless' => 'n'];
 					}
 					# We add quotes to conform to W3C's HTML spec.
 					$working = 1;
 					$mode = 0;
-					$attr = preg_replace("%^[^\s\"']+(\s+|$)%", '', $attr);
+					$attr = preg_replace("%^[^\s\"']+(\s+|$)%", '', (string) $attr);
 				}
 
 				break;
@@ -884,7 +884,7 @@
 	if ($mode == 1 && false === array_key_exists($attrname, $attrarr))
 		# special case, for when the attribute list ends with a valueless
 		# attribute like "selected"
-		$attrarr[$attrname] = array ('name' => $attrname, 'value' => '', 'whole' => $attrname, 'vless' => 'y');
+		$attrarr[$attrname] =  ['name' => $attrname, 'value' => '', 'whole' => $attrname, 'vless' => 'y'];
 
 	return $attrarr;
 }
@@ -953,7 +953,7 @@
 			# is a "y" or a "Y", the attribute must not have a value.
